SAVE
Who We Are

A Legacy of Fine Spirits, Delivered with Precision

SA Ventures Private Limited is a premier liquor importer and distributor, bringing world-class spirits from France, Scotland, Holland and beyond to discerning markets across India, the Middle East and Australia.

With an authorised tie-up with TASMAC (Tamil Nadu State Marketing Corporation) and established distribution across Kerala, Puducherry, Oman, UAE and Australia, we are a trusted bridge between globally recognised distilleries and regional consumers.

Our philosophy is simple — Quality · Tradition · Passion · Trust — values that define every bottle in our portfolio.

Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

🌟
Vision

To become a globally recognised beverage distribution group, building strong international brands across India and expanding into multiple high-growth markets worldwide.

We envision a structured global network connecting premium European producers with dynamic consumer markets — positioning our portfolio brands as trusted names across retail, HORECA and duty-free channels.

🚀
Mission
  • Establish and scale portfolio brands across India through strong distribution partnerships
  • Expand into new international markets with structured compliance and logistics
  • Develop exclusive territory collaborations built on trust and long-term growth
  • Curate high-quality imported spirits, wines and beers tailored to regional needs
  • Create lasting value for suppliers, distributors and retail partners worldwide
Get In Touch

Partner or Enquire

⚠️ Drink Responsibly

Alcohol consumption is injurious to health. Drinking and driving is dangerous and illegal. Not for sale to persons under the age of 18 years.

⚖️ Legal Compliance

SA Ventures Pvt Ltd operates in full compliance with TASMAC, Kerala BEVCO, Puducherry regulations and applicable Indian excise laws.

📋 Licensing

All products distributed under valid licences from respective State Excise Departments through authorised government-approved channels only.

🚫 Prohibited Sale

Sale to persons under 18 years is strictly prohibited. This site is for B2B trade enquiries only. SA Ventures does not promote excessive consumption.

🌍 Export Compliance

International distribution to Oman, UAE and Australia conducted in compliance with respective import regulations, customs laws and local licensing requirements.

STATUTORY WARNING: Consumption of alcohol is injurious to health and is habit-forming.  |  Do not drink and drive.  |  Sale to minors strictly prohibited.  |  Not for sale in dry states/districts.
